repo_ownership.responsibility: ExecutionIdentity, WorkspacePlan, FSM, stream envelope, approval DTO, generated enum/FSM SPI
task context to WorkspacePlan, assignment snapshot, scoped reconcile, stream coalescer, approval endpoint
assignment-id in-flight model, workspace materializer, launch envelope/PATH, retry wrapper, watcher release
private auth broker/storage only when needed; no raw secret/evidence in public docs
optimistic cache upsert, SSE subscription, daemon PID probe, stale lock recovery, update/quit handoff

rag_forbidden: private repository clone URL with credential
raw token, bearer token, PAT, GitHub App installation token
signed URL, temporary credential, SSM parameter value
production smoke response body containing customer/task private content

open_decisions.default: one-shot default, resume id requires explicit resume

open_decisions.decision: web approval timeout and fallback terminal state
WorkspacePlan inline vs linked execution plan id

non_goals: This design does not implement private repo auth immediately.
The public daemon does not bundle or install provider CLI binaries.
The daemon does not own client read-model UI copy.
The workspace materializer does not directly mutate the user's original repo working tree.
Public repositories do not store live deployment payloads or secret evidence.
